radiolib_lora_init.tooltip: Initialize LoRa radio module. SX127x: IRQ=DIO0, GPIO=DIO1; SX126x: IRQ=DIO1, GPIO=BUSY

radiolib_set_bandwidth.tooltip: Set LoRa bandwidth. Higher bandwidth = faster speed but shorter range

radiolib_set_spreading_factor.tooltip: Set LoRa spreading factor (6-12). Higher = longer range but slower speed

radiolib_set_coding_rate.tooltip: Set LoRa coding rate. Higher = better error correction but slower speed

radiolib_set_frequency.tooltip: Set carrier frequency. SX127x: 137-525MHz, SX126x: 150-960MHz, SX1280: 2400-2500MHz

radiolib_set_sync_word.tooltip: Set LoRa sync word. TX and RX must match. Default 0x12, LoRaWAN uses 0x34

radiolib_transmit.tooltip: Send text message (blocking mode), waits until transmission is complete

radiolib_receive.tooltip: Receive message (blocking mode), waits until data received or timeout

radiolib_on_receive.tooltip: Triggered when LoRa module receives a packet, uses interrupt-driven reception

radiolib_start_receive.tooltip: Start async receive mode, use with interrupt callback

radiolib_received_data.tooltip: Get received data content inside receive callback

radiolib_received_rssi.tooltip: Get RSSI of received packet inside callback, in dBm

radiolib_received_snr.tooltip: Get SNR of received packet inside callback, in dB

radiolib_get_rssi.tooltip: Get RSSI of last received packet, in dBm

radiolib_get_snr.tooltip: Get SNR of last received packet, in dB

radiolib_sleep.tooltip: Put LoRa module into low-power sleep mode

radiolib_standby.tooltip: Put LoRa module into standby mode for quick wake-up
